productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Mushroom Brown Shoes
description: Style NoteLend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear.Product DetailsMushroom brown shoe with central lace- ups, inlays and overlays Padded tongue and inner with a removable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticThick rubber midsole with branding embossed on the lateral side and stitch detailingTPU outsole with exagerated herringbone grooves, arched midfoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
